scope: n8n base nodes (packages/nodes-base/nodes/*) — versioned variants and trigger-only nodes follow their own roadmap per the manifest header. SabFlow coverage is computed against forge block ids under src/lib/sabflow/forge/blocks/**.ts plus rust executors under rust/crates/sabflow-nodes/src/nodes/*.rs.
note: SabFlow ships an executor (forge block or rust node) for every service in the n8n base-node manifest. The diff is empty as of this generation. Triggers and versioned (V1/V2/V3) variants live outside this manifest and are tracked separately.
